iterations.title: Expand labels and retrain centroids
iterations.goal: Improve classifier reliability and scientific readiness while preserving truthful gate semantics.

phases.title: Diagnostics Baseline and Failure Taxonomy
phases.goal: Establish a factual baseline and artifact fingerprints before changing the science pipeline.

tasks.title: Pipeline map confirmation
tasks.description: Confirm the canonical extraction, classification, aggregation, and evaluation entry points.

preconditions.message: Pipeline map must exist for diagnostics baseline.

tasks.title: Held-out baseline evaluation
tasks.description: Run the canonical held-out evaluator and persist detailed metrics.

preconditions.message: Held-out dataset missing.

tasks.title: Tiny batch sanity classification
tasks.description: Run the baseline diagnostics sample classification flow on a bounded 2024 subset.

tasks.title: Batch coverage check
tasks.description: Verify that extracted and classified sample counts align and that no silent skips occurred.

preconditions.message: Silent skip or coverage mismatch detected in diagnostics baseline.

tasks.title: Failure taxonomy generation
tasks.description: Persist held-out error transitions for later comparison.

preconditions.message: Failure taxonomy output missing.

tasks.title: Baseline report assembly
tasks.description: Collect metrics, coverage, and taxonomy evidence in a human-readable report.

preconditions.message: Baseline report missing.

phases.title: Label Expansion and Dataset Hygiene
phases.goal: Expand the labeled dataset with leakage-safe sampling and QA, without falsely passing the strict canonical science gate.

tasks.title: Audit source labeled dataset
tasks.description: Verify the base labeled dataset exists and has non-trivial size.

preconditions.message: Base labeled dataset missing.
Base labeled dataset is too small for Iteration 1 expansion.

tasks.title: Audit candidate sentence integrity
tasks.description: Evaluate whether the candidate labeled dataset is clean enough for manual extension and future IRR work.

tasks.title: Build labeling sample
tasks.description: Generate the strict canonical Phase 1 sample and metadata.

tasks.title: Manual labeling handoff
tasks.description: Human labeling of the generated sample sheet.

preconditions.message: Labeling sheet must exist before manual labeling.

tasks.title: Dedupe merge
tasks.description: Merge base and newly labeled rows while excluding leakage and conflicts.

tasks.title: Dataset QA
tasks.description: Enforce canonical size, class floor, and leakage checks for the strict Phase 1 dataset.

tasks.title: Metadata and report generation
tasks.description: Ensure strict Phase 1 metadata and reports exist for downstream traceability.

preconditions.message: Phase 1 QA report missing.

phases.title: IRR Gate
phases.goal: Establish IRR infrastructure and prevent IRR execution from proceeding when source sentence quality is inadequate.

tasks.title: Audit IRR source sentence integrity
tasks.description: Check whether the IRR source dataset is labelable enough to justify manual IRR work.

preconditions.message: IRR source dataset missing.

tasks.title: Prepare IRR subset
tasks.description: Create the stratified IRR master sheet and blinded rater 2 template.

tasks.title: Manual second-rater handoff
tasks.description: Collect blinded labels from a second human rater.

tasks.title: Compute infrastructure IRR metrics
tasks.description: Write pending/pass/fail status artifacts in infrastructure mode without falsely clearing the strict science gate.

tasks.title: Build adjudication sheet
tasks.description: Create disagreements and adjudication scaffold, even when rater 2 is still pending.

tasks.title: Strict kappa recheck
tasks.description: Run the strict κ gate after rater 2 completion.

quality_checks.message: Strict IRR gate has not passed.

tasks.title: Final adjudicated merge
tasks.description: Merge final adjudicated labels back into the recovery dataset once adjudication is complete.

phases.title: Centroid Retraining
phases.goal: Retrain centroid artifacts only after adjudicated labels and strict IRR gates are available.

tasks.title: Freeze adjudicated training dataset
tasks.description: Confirm the adjudicated dataset exists before retraining centroids.

preconditions.message: Strict IRR gate must pass before retraining.

tasks.title: Embed labeled sentences
tasks.description: Generate MPNet embeddings for the current labeled training dataset.

tasks.title: Compute centroids
tasks.description: Compute label centroids from MPNet embeddings.

tasks.title: Fingerprint centroid metadata
tasks.description: Record centroid hashes and metadata for reproducibility.

preconditions.message: Centroids must exist before metadata fingerprinting.

tasks.title: Verify label mapping compatibility
tasks.description: Confirm centroid label ordering and metadata align with classifier expectations.

phases.title: Classifier Calibration
phases.goal: Tune and validate classification behavior without leakage.

tasks.title: Verify split registry
tasks.description: Ensure frozen split registry exists before any tuning.

preconditions.message: Split registry missing; leakage-safe calibration cannot proceed.

tasks.title: Run threshold pass on validation only
tasks.description: Run leakage-safe threshold tuning on validation artifacts only.

tasks.title: Run held-out evaluation
tasks.description: Evaluate the calibrated classifier on the held-out set.

preconditions.message: Centroids missing for held-out evaluation.

tasks.title: Generate calibration decision report
tasks.description: Summarize tuning choices, held-out performance, and release readiness.

preconditions.message: Held-out evaluation must exist before decision reporting.

phases.title: Batch Classification 2021-2024
phases.goal: Run bounded multi-year classification with explicit coverage and aggregation checks.

tasks.title: Build year/file manifest
tasks.description: Freeze the list of candidate AI sentence files for the batch run.

tasks.title: Classify yearly batches
tasks.description: Run multi-year classification over 2021-2024 AI sentence files.

preconditions.message: Centroids missing for batch classification.

tasks.title: Coverage and skip audit
tasks.description: Confirm expected years/files were processed without silent skips.

tasks.title: Aggregation sanity check
tasks.description: Aggregate classified outputs and confirm counts are coherent.

tasks.title: Batch summary report
tasks.description: Summarize yearly processing, coverage, and aggregation evidence.

iterations.title: Scale classification and integrate cross-walks
iterations.goal: Produce full-sample sentence and firm-year outputs for downstream analysis.

phases.title: Aggregation and cross-walk integration
phases.goal: Build firm-year measures with validated joins.

iterations.title: Evaluate OpenAI API strategy
iterations.goal: Decide whether LLM classification should augment the deterministic baseline.

phases.title: Hybrid routing decision
phases.goal: Record the production decision on LLM usage.

iterations.title: Final integration and production hardening
iterations.goal: Deliver a reproducible, auditable, publication-ready package.

phases.title: Panel assembly
phases.goal: Build the final panel and downstream datasets.

phases.title: Robustness analysis
phases.goal: Run final empirical and robustness workflows.

phases.title: Release packaging
phases.goal: Package the repo, outputs, and audit trail for release.
